coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 16:48 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 16:48 at 70%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 120%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:48 at 120-120% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/7. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:48.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 1:48 at 120-120%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 3:36 at 115%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/7. 115% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/7. You've accumulated 1min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/7. 22 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/7. 4:48 at 112%. Cadence: 85-100 rpm. Seated. 4 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/7. You're building something real here. 4 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/7. 112% FTP. Keep 85-100 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 44% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 110% FTP × 6:36. After rest, expect 112% for 4min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 44% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 44% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 44% done. 110% for 6:36. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 55% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 55% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 55% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 55% done. 112% for 4:48. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 63% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 6/7. 1 to go. You've accumulated 21min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 63% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 1 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% complete. Rep 6/7. Fatigue is real — hold form. 115%, 85-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 7/7. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 16 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 1:48 at 120%. Then 16 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 120-120% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 72% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 27min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 72% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 16:48. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
